bundle.name: stark-ops
bundle.description: Repository operations beyond the spec-driven pipeline — cut releases, housekeep stale issues/branches/worktrees, run session start/end, and switch GitHub identities.

artifacts.name: stark-gh-user
artifacts.description: Switch the active GitHub user identity (primary ↔ secondary) for `gh` invocations to dodge per-user GraphQL/REST rate limits. Tokens live in macOS Keychain (service `stark-gh-token`).

artifacts.name: stark-housekeeping
artifacts.description: Audit and clean up stale issues, dead branches, and worktree remnants. Use for cleanup, housekeeping, close stale issues.

artifacts.name: stark-release
artifacts.description: Cut a release: changelog review (auto-generating from git log if [Unreleased] is empty), version bump, git tag, GitHub Release. Use for release, tag, bump version.

artifacts.name: stark-session
artifacts.description: Session start (context, git state, briefing) and end (tests, merge, push). Use for session start/end, catch me up.
